title: Create touchpad scrolling fix
description: Adds mouse scrolling sensitivity setting for Create mod to fix high sensitivity issue on touchpads and trackpads
body:
This mod adds mouse scrolling sensitivity setting for Create mod to fix high sensitivity issue on touchpads and trackpads.

![Screenshot of mod settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b393c56079692b61443321dac13e10bda0ad343e.png)

Choose your version:
  - **Fabric**
    - **Minecraft 1.20.1**
      - **Create 6.0.8.0**
        - [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-touchpad-scrolling-fix/version/1.0.0-fabric1.20.1-create6.0.8.0)
        - [Git source](https://git.hloth.dev/demovio/minecraft-create-touchpad-scrolling-fix/src/branch/fabric-mc1.20.1-create6.0.8.0)
      - **Create 0.5.1**
        - [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-touchpad-scrolling-fix/version/1.0.0-fabric1.20.1-create0.5.1)
        - [Git source](https://git.hloth.dev/demovio/minecraft-create-touchpad-scrolling-fix/src/branch/fabric-mc1.20.1-create0.5.1)
  - **Forge**
    - **Minecraft 1.20.1**
      - **Create 6.0.8**
        - Currently in development. [Blocked](https://git.hloth.dev/demovio/minecraft-create-touchpad-scrolling-fix/issues/1) by a bug in Sponge mixin library.
        - [Git source](https://git.hloth.dev/demovio/minecraft-create-touchpad-scrolling-fix/src/branch/forge-mc1.20.1-create6.0.8)
  - **NeoForge**
    - **Minecraft 1.21.1**
        - [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-touchpad-scrolling-fix/version/1.0.0-neoforge1.21.1-create6.0.8)
        - [Git source](https://git.hloth.dev/demovio/minecraft-create-touchpad-scrolling-fix/src/branch/neoforge-mc1.21.1-create6.0.8)
